user.title: Configure FuelWatch HA
user.description: Enter the suburb and fuel type to search for stations.

data_description.suburb: Western Australian suburb name (e.g. Secret Harbour, Naval Base).
data_description.product: The type of fuel you want to monitor.

station.title: Select Station
station.description: Found {count} stations for {product} near {suburb}. Stations are listed cheapest first with today's price. Both today and tomorrow prices will be tracked.

error.no_stations_found: No stations found. Check the suburb spelling and that stations in the area sell this fuel type.
